summary: Excellent stadium audience recording capturing a strong first set with Ramble on Rose, Loose Lucy and Promised Land, plus solid second‑set gems like Last Time and Stella Blue.
review: Both reviewers praise the audio, calling it the best audience source and noting its clear, stadium‑sized sound. The performance shines in the first set – Ramble on Rose hits hard, Loose Lucy is spot‑on and Promised Land is a killer – while the second set offers reliable renditions of Last Time and Stella Blue, though no standout moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are uniformly positive about both show and recording quality; with limited (2) reviews the rating is based on strong musical highlights and excellent audience source but confidence remains low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear stadium ambience with crisp audience mix; reviewers describe it as the best AUD source and note no audible flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is highlighted as strong and energetic, while the second set maintains a solid, though less spectacular, groove.
